content.en:
The Temple of the Gods can be called the number one force in the Dao Mountain Realm Alliance, and many Dao Ancestors are now very confused.

For example, the Forbidden Temple and the Starhorn Clan had all taken refuge in other forces, so they didn't need to make a choice anyway, and they weren't afraid of being retaliated against by the other Upper Triple Heaven forces.

But the Temple of the Gods is different, and has not yet taken refuge in any force.

Originally, the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was not promoted, and their choice was not wrong, they were very leisurely and unrestrained, and they had a large number of forbidden treasures and resources from the major true kingdoms of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, without being deducted by other forces, so every Dao Ancestor was making rapid progress.

For example, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, after refining some forbidden Dao stones and a large number of forbidden strange things, the power of the Dao Ancestor was refined and purified, and the Supreme Sword Dao improved more, so the strength has been improved to the extreme of the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he is about to be promoted to the strength of the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

But even if he became the strength of the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor, it was not as good as those Sixth Heaven forces, let alone compared to the Upper Three Heavenly Forces.

this day.

Many Dao Ancestors of the Temple of the Gods held a meeting together to discuss the future direction of the Temple of the Gods.

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, God of War Tower Lord, Immortal Gate Lord, Battle Axe Dao Ancestor, Chaos Merchant Bank Governor Gold and Silver Dao Ancestor, Mercenary Alliance Alliance Leader Iron Fist Dao Ancestor......

One by one, big people arrived, and the whole conference hall was extremely lively.

Many Dao Ancestors sat down one by one, and the meeting began.

As the strongest person here, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor took the lead in speaking: "Everyone, you must be aware of the fact that the Xuanxu Ancient Realm is going to be promoted to the Ancient Realm, right? This matter is indeed beyond our expectations, and many of our plans and arrangements have been scrapped! Once the Ancient Realm is born, those Dao Ancestors of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm will not be restricted, and our good days will come to an end! At that time, the division of forces in the Dao Mountain Realm will definitely be reshuffled, and our territory will definitely not be saved!"

"Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, there is no need to say these words, we all understand, what should we do now?" said the Immortal Sect Master.

"I have two suggestions!" Void Heaven Dao Ancestor proposed: "The first suggestion is to maintain the current alliance method, but we must give up most of the territory and give it to those Upper Triple Heaven forces, but this method is not very safe, we don't have the protection of a strong force, and it is easy to encounter attacks;

As soon as these words came out, many Dao Ancestors were dissatisfied.

At the beginning, it was the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor who proposed an alliance and jointly fought against those Upper Triple Heaven forces, but now how long has it been since he proposed to join other forces?

If they had known that this would happen, they should have taken refuge in the first place, and then they could have gained a lot of benefits.

If you take refuge now, not to mention whether those forces will accept it or not, even if you accept it, the treatment will be almost gone.

"Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, it was you who advocated not taking refuge at the beginning, so we followed you to form the Temple of the Gods, and now you say this, do you want to give up the Temple of the Gods? It seems that there are two suggestions, isn't it just one suggestion, that is, to take refuge!" Jin Yin Dao Ancestor sneered.

"Gold and Silver Dao Ancestor, what do you mean, I am advocating the establishment of the Temple of the Gods, but don't you have no objection? Now that something has happened, you want to put the responsibility on me?"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was also angry.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor and the Gold and Silver Dao Ancestor quarreled hotly, and the Battle Axe Dao Ancestor opened his mouth to persuade him: "Everyone calm down, don't quarrel! In this way, everyone votes, whether to disband the Temple of the Gods, or continue to maintain it! Once it is disbanded, how to do it, that is the matter of each faction!"

"Okay, vote, I agree!"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor nodded.

Immediately, one Dao Ancestor began to vote.

After a while, the voting ended.

Nearly ninety percent of the Dao Ancestors agreed to dissolve the Temple of the Gods, obviously everyone was not very optimistic about the future of the Temple of the Gods, or they were already planning to join a certain force in their hearts.

"Then disband!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor sighed.

In this way, the Temple of the Gods, an alliance that had not been established for a long time, was dissolved.

Soon after, the other alliance forces in the Daoshan Realm were also disbanded one by one, and the forces in the Daoshan Realm had collapsed.

It wasn't long ago, about a hundred years.

One by one, the forces took refuge in the Upper Triple Heaven Forces, and the Upper Triple Heaven Forces lost too many True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors in the last Huoyan Forbidden Land War, so they urgently needed to expand their forces, so they accepted those forces that took refuge.

Of course, they didn't pay any price, let alone give any benefits, and even accepted offerings from those forces.

-------------

Void and innocent country, human race.

The incarnation of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor descended again and came to Ye Tian's residence.

This time they met, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor found that he couldn't see through his apprentice, as if the other party's strength had reached a very high level.

He knew that his apprentice was not weaker than the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor now, and his strength was gradually approaching him.

"Master!"

Ye Tian was still very respectful to the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and hurriedly greeted him.

"Apprentice, there is one thing that the master has come to you this time!" said the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor with some embarrassment.

"What's the matter?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"The Temple of the Gods has been disbanded, I want to join the Black Wind Mountain with the Void Heaven lineage!" "The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said: "But I don't know the Dao Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain, and I can't contact them, and you are the Heavenly General of the Black Wind Mountain, and your status is second only to the Ten Kings, so I want to ask you to help find the Black Wind Mountain Kings to talk to!"

"Take refuge in Black Wind Mountain!"

Ye Tian frowned.

This matter is not easy to do, because the Black Wind Mountain has not had a single subsidiary force so far, and it is all a peak master and general who recruits members to develop the Black Wind Mountain, or recruit geniuses through the inheritance of the Black Wind Mountain.

So.

He didn't know if the Wind King was willing to accept the Void Heaven Pulse, and if the Wind King didn't agree, he couldn't help it.

"Apprentice, there is no way to be a teacher, in case the Ancient Realm is born and the Dao Ancestors are not restricted, I am afraid that many Upper Triple Heaven forces will be eliminated as teachers!"

"Master, I'll go and discuss with the Wind King!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

"Good!"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor nodded.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian arranged for this incarnation of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor to live in the human race, while he personally entered the small realm of the Wind King and used the Heavenly General Order to contact the Wind King.

"Nine Extremes Heavenly General, what are you contacting me about?"

The Wind King's voice permeated Ye Tian's surroundings.

"Wind King, the lower master Void Heaven Dao Ancestor wants to join the Black Wind Mountain with the Void Heaven lineage, I wonder if the Black Wind Mountain can accept it?" Ye Tian said.

"Black Wind Mountain does not accept affiliated forces, after all, it is not easy to manage!"

The Wind King replied.

"Is there no way?"

Ye Tian frowned.

At this time, the Wind King was silent for a moment, and then said: "There is another way, let the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor join the Black Wind Mountain and become a Heavenly King, and the members of the Void Heaven First Pulse will be included in the legion under his command, so that he can be regarded as a member of the Black Wind Mountain! However, the title of the Void Heaven One Pulse will be withdrawn, and it can only be called the Void Sky Legion! If he is willing, I will agree to let him join the Black Wind Mountain, if he is unwilling, then he will not accept it!"

"Thank you, Wind King!"

Ye Tian also knew that this was the Wind King's biggest concession, so he left the Wind King's small realm.
